items.abstract_zh: 基于深度学习的模型主导了当前的生产推荐系统。然而，CPU 端 DRAM 数据访问和 GPU 处理之间的差距仍然阻碍了它们的推理性能。 GPU 驻留缓存可以弥补这一差距，但我们发现现有系统在 GPU 上缓存嵌入表（一个巨大的稀疏结构）的优势尚未得到利用。在本文中，我们提出了 Fleche，这是一种整体缓存方案，具有用于高效 GPU 驻留嵌入缓存的详细设计。 Fleche (1) 对所有嵌入表使用一个缓存后端，以提高总缓存利用率，(2) 将小型内核调用合并为一个单一调用，以减少内核维护的开销（例如，内核启动和同步）。此外，我们精心设计了缓存查询工作流程，以实现更细粒度的并行性。对真实世界数据集的评估表明，与现有技术相比，Fleche将嵌入层的吞吐量显着提高了2.0 - 5.4倍，并且端到端推理吞吐量的加速高达2.4倍。

items.title: LiteReconfig: cost and content aware reconfiguration of video object detection systems for mobile GPUs.
items.abstract: An adaptive video object detection system selects different execution paths at runtime, based on video content and available resources, so as to maximize accuracy under a target latency objective ( e.g. , 30 frames per second). Such a system is well suited to mobile devices with limited computing resources, and often running multiple contending applications. Existing solutions suffer from two major drawbacks. First , collecting feature values to decide on an execution branch is expensive. Second , there is a switching overhead for transitioning between branches and this overhead depends on the transition pair. LiteReconfig , an efficient and adaptive video object detection framework, addresses these challenges. LiteReconfig features a cost-benefit analyzer to decide which features to use, and which execution branch to run, at inference time. Furthermore, LiteReconfig has a content-aware accuracy prediction model, to select an execution branch tailored for frames in a video stream. We demonstrate that LiteReconfig achieves significantly improved accuracy under a set of varying latency objectives than existing systems, while maintaining up to 50 fps on an NVIDIA AGX Xavier board. Our code, with DOI, is available at https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.6345733.
items.abstract_zh: 自适应视频对象检测系统基于视频内容和可用资源在运行时选择不同的执行路径，以便在目标延迟目标（例如，每秒30帧）下最大化准确性。这样的系统非常适合计算资源有限且经常运行多个竞争应用程序的移动设备。现有的解决方案有两个主要缺点。首先，收集特征值来决定执行分支的成本很高。其次，分支之间的转换存在切换开销，并且该开销取决于转换对。 LiteReconfig 是一种高效且自适应的视频对象检测框架，可以解决这些挑战。 LiteReconfig 具有成本效益分析器，可在推理时决定使用哪些功能以及运行哪个执行分支。此外，LiteReconfig 具有内容感知准确性预测模型，可以选择针对视频流中的帧量身定制的执行分支。我们证明，与现有系统相比，LiteReconfig 在一组不同的延迟目标下实现了显着提高的准确性，同时在 NVIDIA AGX Xavier 板上保持高达 50 fps。我们的代码（带有 DOI）可在 https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.6345733 上获取。

items.title: GNNLab: a factored system for sample-based GNN training over GPUs.
items.abstract: We propose GNNLab, a sample-based GNN training system in a single machine multi-GPU setup. GNNLab adopts a factored design for multiple GPUs, where each GPU is dedicated to the task of graph sampling or model training. It accelerates both tasks by eliminating GPU memory contention. To balance GPU workloads, GNNLab applies a global queue to bridge GPUs asynchronously and adopts a simple yet effective method to adaptively allocate GPUs for different tasks. GNNLab further leverages temporarily switching to avoid idle waiting on GPUs. Furthermore, GNNLab proposes a new pre-sampling based caching policy that takes both sampling algorithms and GNN datasets into account, and shows an efficient and robust caching performance. Evaluations on three representative GNN models and four real-life graphs show that GNNLab outperforms the state-of-the-art GNN systems DGL and PyG by up to 9.1× (from 2.4×) and 74.3× (from 10.2×), respectively. In addition, our pre-sampling based caching policy achieves 90% -- 99% of the optimal cache hit rate in all experiments.
items.abstract_zh: 我们提出了 GNNLab，这是一种在单机多 GPU 设置中基于样本的 GNN 训练系统。 GNNLab 采用多 GPU 分解设计，每个 GPU 专门用于图采样或模型训练的任务。它通过消除 GPU 内存争用来加速这两项任务。为了平衡 GPU 工作负载，GNNLab 应用全局队列异步桥接 GPU，并采用简单而有效的方法为不同任务自适应分配 GPU。 GNNLab 进一步利用临时切换来避免 GPU 空闲等待。此外，GNNLab 提出了一种新的基于预采样的缓存策略，该策略同时考虑了采样算法和 GNN 数据集，并显示出高效且稳健的缓存性能。对三个代表性 GNN 模型和四个现实图表的评估表明，GNNLab 的性能分别优于最先进的 GNN 系统 DGL 和 PyG 高达 9.1 倍（从 2.4 倍）和 74.3 倍（从 10.2 倍）。此外，我们基于预采样的缓存策略在所有实验中实现了 90% - 99% 的最佳缓存命中率。

items.title: OPEC: operation-based security isolation for bare-metal embedded systems.
items.abstract:
Bare-metal embedded systems usually lack security isolation. Attackers can subvert the whole system with a single vulnerability. Previous research intends to enforce both privilege isolation (to run application code at the unprivileged level) and resource isolation for global variables and peripherals. However, it suffers from partition-time and execution-time over-privilege issues, due to the limited hardware resources (MPU regions) and the improper way to partition a program.

In this paper, we propose operation-based isolation for bare-metal embedded systems. An operation is a logically independent task composed of an entry function and all functions reachable from it. To solve the partition-time over-privilege issue, we utilize the global variables shadowing technique to reduce the needed MPU regions to confine the access of the global variables. To mitigate the execution-time over-privilege issue, we split programs into code compartments (called operation) that only contain necessary functions to perform specific tasks, thereby removing the resources needed by unnecessary functions. We implement a prototype called OPEC, which contains an LLVM-based compiler and a reference monitor. The compiler partitions a program and analyzes the resource dependency for each operation. With the hardware-supported privilege levels and MPU, the reference monitor is responsible for enforcing the privilege and resource isolation at runtime. Our evaluation shows that OPEC can achieve the security guarantees for the privilege and resource isolation with negligible runtime overhead (average 0.23%), moderate Flash overhead (average 1.79%), and acceptable SRAM overhead (average 5.35%).
items.abstract_zh:
裸机嵌入式系统通常缺乏安全隔离。攻击者可以利用一个漏洞破坏整个系统。先前的研究旨在对全局变量和外设实施特权隔离（在非特权级别运行应用程序代码）和资源隔离。然而，由于有限的硬件资源（MPU 区域）和不正确的程序分区方式，它存在分区时间和执行时间越权问题。

在本文中，我们提出了针对裸机嵌入式系统的基于操作的隔离。操作是逻辑上独立的任务，由入口函数和可从其访问的所有函数组成。为了解决分区时间权限过高问题，我们利用全局变量阴影技术来减少所需的 MPU 区域以限制全局变量的访问。为了缓解执行时权限过高的问题，我们将程序分成代码隔间（称为操作），其中仅包含执行特定任务所需的函数，从而消除了不必要的函数所需的资源。我们实现了一个名为 OPEC 的原型，其中包含一个基于 LLVM 的编译器和一个参考监视器。编译器对程序进行分区并分析每个操作的资源依赖性。通过硬件支持的权限级别和 MPU，参考监视器负责在运行时强制实施权限和资源隔离。我们的评估表明，OPEC 能够以可忽略的运行时开销（平均 0.23%）、中等的 Flash 开销（平均 1.79%）和可接受的 SRAM 开销（平均 5.35%）实现权限和资源隔离的安全保证。

items.title: EuroSys '22: Seventeenth European Conference on Computer Systems, Rennes, France, April 5 - 8, 2022
items.abstract: This year's program features exciting developments along key aspects of systems research. The accepted papers present the latest advances in systems for machine learning, distributed systems, security, concurrency and failure tolerance, storage systems, operating systems, and cloud infrastructure.
items.abstract_zh: 今年的计划在系统研究的关键方面取得了令人兴奋的进展。接受的论文展示了机器学习、分布式系统、安全性、并发性和容错、存储系统、操作系统和云基础设施方面的最新进展。
